description: AI model routing on your own vendor keys: pick the best model per prompt, or route and run it.

headers.description: Optional: Bearer <your Oriora API key> for the API-key path. Or connect with no header — the server returns 401 + WWW-Authenticate and completes OAuth 2.1 (dynamic client registration) automatically.
